releaseNotes:
Guest Booking 0.3.0
Conferences & meetings

Conferences & Meetings is now the single place for conference events and meeting room bookings.
When creating or editing a conference, choose which meeting rooms to reserve on the same form.
All day or start/end times for room bookings on single-day events; multi-day events stay all-day.
Conference appears as a real meeting room in Settings → Rooms (seeded on upgrade; can be deleted like other rooms).
Calendar views show meeting room bookings under the conference color.
Old /meeting-rooms URLs redirect to Conferences & Meetings.
Users & access

Custom roles — create your own roles with per-area access instead of fixed presets (Manager, Front desk, etc.).
Settings access is a separate flag on a role (full admin).
Redesigned Settings → Users with avatars and clearer role management.
Existing users are migrated automatically; legacy meeting_rooms permission maps to Conference.
Updates

In-app updates stay on the same page and reload in place when finished.
Progress is shown in the app (no separate PowerShell window).
Other

Conference day-guest counts still supported on the conference form.
Meeting-only color removed from General settings; meeting bookings use the conference color.
Upgrade notes (for admins)
After updating, review Settings → Users → Roles and adjust permissions if needed.
Train staff: meeting room booking is done from Conferences & Meetings, not a separate menu.
If you use timed room bookings, set start/end dates to the same day to see time fields.
